meta_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Checklist)
content.seo_description: Learn how to master SaaS pricing and overcome tutorial hell. An advanced-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for high-converting builds.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop building features and start shipping business logic. By integrating dynamic SaaS pricing models directly into your MVP architecture using Antigravity and Claude Code, you shift focus from code syntax to revenue validation, ensuring every line of code serves a measurable customer acquisition goal.
content.intro:
You are drowning in a sea of boilerplate, stuck in a perpetual loop of 'Hello World' tutorials that promise the moon but deliver zero revenue. The screen glows with the promise of innovation, yet you feel the crushing weight of technical debt before a single user has even logged in. This isn't a coding problem; it's a lack of product-market focus disguised as a learning curve.

Today, we break the cycle. We are moving beyond the tutorial sandbox into the arena of high-stakes SaaS development. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for autonomous feature implementation, we will engineer a pricing-first architecture that forces you to confront the only metric that matters: recurring revenue.

steps.title: Define the Value Metric
steps.description: Stop guessing your price. Identify the specific unit of value your SaaS provides (e.g., tokens, storage, seats) and map it to your data schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current database schema. Propose a pricing strategy based on a usage-based billing model that scales with user consumption.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Review my prisma schema and inject a UsageMetric model that ties billing to API call volume.'

steps.title: Architect the Pricing Logic
steps.description: Implement a flexible pricing tier system that can be adjusted without rewriting the core application logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular pricing engine that supports freemium, pro, and enterprise tiers using a decorator pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Create a PricingService class that handles tier validation and feature gating logic.'

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Webhooks
steps.description: Ensure your application responds instantly to subscription events like upgrades, downgrades, and churn.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure Stripe webhook handler that syncs subscription status with my internal database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Implement a secure webhook route for Stripe events and update user subscription status in the database.'

steps.title: Build Feature Gating
steps.description: Protect your premium features at the API layer to ensure no user accesses paid content without a valid subscription.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware function that checks user subscription status before executing protected API routes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /edit 'Apply the subscription middleware to all routes in the /api/pro directory.'

steps.title: Automate Revenue Monitoring
steps.description: Set up automated dashboards that alert you when a user triggers a billing event.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft an observability script that logs revenue-generating events to a dashboard for real-time tracking.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'How can I integrate an event listener that logs every successful checkout to my analytics dashboard?'

pro_tips: Always price based on the value delivered, not the cost of your compute.
Ship your pricing page before your core feature to validate willingness to pay.
Use feature flags to test pricing variations on 10% of your traffic before a full rollout.
Never hardcode pricing tiers; fetch them from a remote configuration service or database.
Focus on churn reduction metrics early; one saved user is worth five new signups.
content.next_steps: Deploy your pricing model to a staging environment and run a smoke test using Stripe's test mode to verify all billing events trigger correctly.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for free and start building for growth. Your SaaS deserves a professional foundation that turns users into paying customers from day one. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
